title: fix(core): use findParent for input step processor span parenting
summary: Fixes input step processor spans being incorrectly parented to MODEL_GENERATION spans instead of AGENT_RUN spans in Langfuse. Uses findParent(SpanType.AGENT_RUN) to walk up the span parent chain with fallback to parent and then currentSpan. Includes 3 unit tests covering the fallback chain. Only touches runner.ts (1 line logic change) and runner.test.ts (new test block).
maintainerNotes: This PR was superseded by #11683 ('Fixed tracing of processors'), which was merged on Jan 7 — 5 days after this PR was opened. PR #11683 took a more comprehensive approach: it moved span creation into workflow steps so each processor gets its own span, added new entity types (INPUT_STEP_PROCESSOR, OUTPUT_STEP_PROCESSOR), and explicitly reverted the findParent approach from this PR in favor of using currentSpan directly. The current PR now has merge conflicts (DIRTY/CONFLICTING state) because runner.ts has been significantly refactored by #11683 and subsequent PRs. CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (never completed). This PR should be closed as superseded.
